title: coelogyne tetradactylifera
intro: Coelogyne tetradactylifera is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, known for its unique four-fingered lip shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne tetradactylifera include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its possible role in treating various health conditions such as diabetes and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Coelogyne tetradactylifera may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
